name: The difference between rhythm and pacing - Premiere Pro Video Tutorial
snippet:
In music, rhythm refers to this pattern, da, da, da, da, or whatever it is. In film rhythm refers to the overall flow of the story.
While connected, rhythm and pacing are not the same. Rhythm is the order of notes that make up the melody . Pacing is how fast or slow a song ...

name: Making a DJ edit with beat intro and outro a.k.a 'DJ Beats' - YouTube
snippet:
How to create a DJ edit with a beat intro & beat outro for seamless pop music mixing. Want to make your pop tracks easier to mix?
In this tutorial, I'll show you step-by-step how to create a DJ edit with custom beat intros and outros using Ableton Live 12 and Logic Pro 11.
